ref: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.193, p.129 (1972)
title: Investigation of excited states of 4He via the 2H(d,p)3H and 2H(d,n)3He reactions using a polarized deuteron beam

x4freetext: Investigation of excited states of 4He via the

x4codes.shortRef: Jour: Nuclear Physics, Section A, Vol.193, p.129 (1972)

x4freetext: Seven detectors on a turntable on one side of
the incident beam were used. Four different runs were
carried out for each energy, covering the lab angle
and 60 to 150 degr.. Another detector was fixed at 90
degr. on the other side of this detector array in
order to check the beam integration by a Faraday cup
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.

reacs.QuantHlp: Differential c/s with respect to angle

x4freetext: A 1 mm diam. beam collimator and a 16 mm diam. gas
target filled to 1.6 atm with pure deuterium were
used during the cross-section measurements. The
entrance and exit windows were 2.5 um thick Havar
The statistical error being smaller than the dots.
